next_best_action: Check monitor display settings and font rendering. The font appearance difference between monitors is likely a display calibration or resolution mismatch — not affecting document content.

Verify ClearType font smoothing is enabled on both displays
Calibrate both monitors using Windows color management
If font rendering differs due to monitor type (LCD vs LED), explain this is expected behavior and does not affect printed output
